title: An Ordinance enacting the Supplemental Budget for the reversion of funds amounting to Nine Million Pesos (Php 9,000,000.00) under the 20% Municipal Development Fund CY 2024 current appropriation from capital outlay for the procurement of various equipment, furniture and fixtures for the Los Baños Ambulatory Clinic/Urgent Care Center (Infirmary) in Barangay Mayondon; Child Care Centers in Brgys.
